title: DROP-IN CENTER - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS DROP DROP-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Drop-in center created by and for young adults. Provides opportunities to receive peer support, gain leadership skills, meet new people, set goals, and implement steps to achieve those goals. Support is provided via one-on-one peer support, support groups, and wraparound teams to provide youth/young adults with the tools to create change within youth-serving systems. Young adults can participate in leadership groups, find community involvement opportunities, use a computer lab, photo studio, and sound booth; and participate in social activities like games, open mics, and movies. 11097 SE 21st Avenue Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Ages 14-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 3pm-6pm Email (541) 214-6634 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 214-6643 Main phone Main phone (541) 214-6634 Program Manager Zak Pacholl [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Must submit an application. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Application AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 3pm-6pm Services: Youth Centers Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
